head.title: Somnath Dwarka 6 Days 5 Nights: The Full Loop, No Backtrack
head.meta_description: Five nights, one loop, zero repeated highway. Dwarka, Somnath, Gir and Junagadh from Rs.25,000 pp with hotel, breakfast and vehicle included.
head.h1: Somnath Dwarka Package 6 Days 5 Nights: Itinerary, Price and Booking
head.ctr_rationale: Competitors title on price-off and best-price. This titles on the specific decision this duration forces, which is the only differentiated angle left and the thing the buyer is actually anxious about.

explicitly_not_owned.query: somnath dwarka tour package from ahmedabad

intent_lock.differentiation_proof: Owns the loop geometry: Ahmedabad, Jamnagar side up, NH51 coast down, inland to Gir, north through Junagadh, home. The argument is that five nights converts a there-and-back into a circle with no repeated highway. Night-by-night placement table is unique to this page.
intent_lock.delta_test: PASS. The decision this page owns exists only at this night count and cannot be restated on the hub or on a sibling without becoming that page's subject.
information_gain: Argues the fifth night on route geometry rather than on more sightseeing, and shows the loop that removes the 410 km rerun.
Honest note that the 5 star tier is not the same class in Dwarka, Somnath and Gir as it is in Ahmedabad.

5_star.hotel: The Fern Sattva Resort at Dwarka, best available at Somnath

included: vehicle with driver for the full itinerary
excluded: Gir safari permit, gypsy and guide, paid to the Gujarat Forest Department

aeo_geo.answer_snippet: A somnath dwarka package 6 days 5 nights costs Rs. 25,000 per person at the 3 star tier, Rs. 50,000 at 4 star and Rs. 62,500 at 5 star, with hotel, breakfast and your vehicle included.
quotable_first_party_claims: Rs. 25,000 per person for 5 nights at 3 star, vehicle included.
Dwarka to Somnath is 233 km on NH51, 5 to 6 hours.
Jay Somnath sound and light show runs 7:45 pm to 8:45 pm per the Shree Somnath Trust.
Gir Jungle Trail is closed 16 June to 15 October every year.
aeo_geo.zero_click_defense: The summary can take the price and the distance. It cannot take the decision table, the live permit timing or the reconfirmation of festival-day schedules for a specific date. Brand sits inside the answer snippet.

@graph.name: Somnath Dwarka Package 6 Days 5 Nights
@graph.description: Five nights, one loop, zero repeated highway. Dwarka, Somnath, Gir and Junagadh from Rs.25,000 pp with hotel, breakfast and vehicle included.

@graph._build_note: Totals are the per person per night rate times 5 nights and are visible in the price table on the page. No aggregateRating until real reviews are on the page.

mainEntity.name: Is 6 days enough for the whole Saurashtra circuit?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Five nights covers Dwarka with a full island day, Somnath with both aartis, Gir with a dawn safari and Junagadh on the way home, as a loop rather than a there-and-back.

mainEntity.name: What does a 6 days 5 nights Somnath Dwarka package cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: Rs. 25,000 per person at 3 star, Rs. 50,000 at 4 star and Rs. 62,500 at 5 star, hotel, breakfast and vehicle included. The Gir permit, gypsy and guide are extra.

mainEntity.name: Do we drive the same road twice on this plan?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. The loop runs out via Jamnagar, down the coast on NH51, inland to Gir, then north through Junagadh to Ahmedabad.
